Ntc And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Admission Set One
Off Calendar Nov-15-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Emily c. Wecht, Esq., for plaintiff and moving party: Noah Abrams

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Noah Abrams' motion to compel further responses to requests for admissions is granted. The objections are overruled and stricken. Defendant is ordered to serve verified supplemental responses that comply with CCP 2033.220 within 7 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
